status: GRAY VECTOR - NOT OFFICIAL. See ORACLES.md/DECISIONS.md D-15.
warning: Generated by running the ONLY available Strumok reference implementation (oracles/strumok-dstu8845, pinned commit - see ORACLES.md) against chosen inputs. This proves nothing about that implementation's own correctness against the real DSTU 8845:2019 standard - it only lets a future Rust port be checked for byte-for-byte agreement with this one unaudited reference. Passing these vectors is a regression anchor, not verification, per SECURITY.md's dual-oracle requirement. Replace with real DSTU-published vectors the moment any exist (see docs/dstu9041-8845-info-request-draft.md for the outstanding request to Держспецзв'язку) and re-verify this reference implementation against them at that point too.
note: key/iv/keystream are the raw little-endian byte layout of the uint64_t[] arrays as consumed by dstu8845_init()/produced by dstu8845_crypt() - not a DSTU-defined big-endian encoding. keystream is dstu8845_crypt() applied to an all-zero input buffer, i.e. the raw keystream (crypt XORs with input).
